text_template: Support for today plan comes from HomeServe Owning a home is a joy You get your little piece of the American dream but then it turns out that you have to pay for repairs What Repair costs hit hard and fast when you a homeowner and that where HomeServe comes in Regular homeowner insurance doesn cover a lot of the day wear and tear Plumbing failures HVAC breakdowns electrical issues when those happen you often on your own HomeServe can let you get help fast You can choose a plan for your needs and budget and when something on your plan goes wrong you can call their 24 hotline to start the repair process for as little as a month It's how HomeServe has helped homeowners like you for over 20 years with a trusted national network of 2,600 local contractors. You can join the millions of customers who trust HomeServe for 50% less your first year. Go to Homeserve.com slash explain. That's Homeserve.com slash explain for 50% less. Savings compared to the renewal price. This is Void in Florida.
